# launchdarkly_big_segment_store_integration (Data Source)

Provides a LaunchDarkly big segment store (persistent store) integration data source.

~> **Beta:** This data source wraps a beta LaunchDarkly API. Beta resources may change or be removed in future provider versions.

This data source allows you to retrieve a persistent store integration configuration for an environment by its IDs.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "launchdarkly_big_segment_store_integration" "redis_store" {
  project_key     = "example-project"
  environment_key = "production"
  integration_key = "redis"
  integration_id  = "57c0a8e4f7b9c20b3c5d1234"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_key` (String) The key of the environment the integration belongs to.
- `integration_id` (String) The server-assigned ID of the integration configuration.
- `integration_key` (String) The persistent store technology. One of `redis` or `dynamodb`.
- `project_key` (String) The key of the project the integration belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `config` (String, Sensitive) A JSON string holding the store-specific configuration. Marked sensitive because it carries credentials.
- `id` (String) The ID in the format `project_key/environment_key/integration_key/integration_id`.
- `name` (String) A human-friendly name for the integration configuration.
- `on` (Boolean) Whether the integration is turned on.
- `tags` (Set of String) Tags associated with the integration configuration.
- `version` (Number) The version of the integration configuration.
